style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak through the air, crackling and fizzing as they drift away from the body. A pulsing, vibrant yellow-orange aura surrounds Ditto, with electromagnetic field distortions rippling outward like heat haze. The eyes and tail glow with intense, rhythmic pulses of bright yellow light, casting sharp, dynamic shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
